pageConfig.title: PALS Certification Classes
pageConfig.meta_description: AHA PALS courses for clinicians who respond to pediatric emergencies.
pageConfig.intro: Choose Initial, Renewal, or HeartCode, then select a date and time.

header_credential.image_alt: American Heart Association Authorized Training Site
header_credential.title: American Heart Association Training Site
header_credential.body: AHA BLS, ACLS, PALS, and Heartsaver training at 910CPR.

compare_mode.label: Need PALS ASAP? Show all AHA PALS options

course_options.clarification: Full classroom PALS Provider certification for pediatric emergency response roles.
Renewal path for providers with prior PALS training.
Complete HeartCode PALS online first, then attend an in-person skills session.

delivery_help.label: INSTRUCTOR-LED
delivery_help.text: Initial and Renewal PALS classes are completed in person with an instructor.

delivery_help.label: HEARTCODE
delivery_help.text: HeartCode PALS begins online and is completed with an in-person skills session.
